title: polypodium lugubre
intro: Polypodium lugubre, also known as Polypodium plebejum in some sources, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Polypodium lugubre include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
